chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: 4263 - وَ رَوَى صَفْوَانُ اَلْجَمَّالُ عَنْ أَبِي غُرَّةَ اَلْخُرَاسَانِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اَلْوُضُوءُ قَبْلَ اَلطَّعَامِ وَ بَعْدَهُ يَذْهَبَانِ بِالْفَقْرِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4263 - Safwan al-Jammal narrated from Abi Ghurrah al-Khurasani who said that Abu Abdillah (as) said: "Performing ablution before and after eating removes poverty."
